blended.narrative: Soda Springs is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
